title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 17 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 17/01/2023
Image reference: 2023-01-17_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-17-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Values have remained stable across the Bulker sector
Capesize Aquasalwador (180,000 DWT, Jan 2012, Daehan) sold to Laskaridis Maritime for USD 27.00 mil, VV Value USD 25.26 mil - BWTS. Pacific Basin acquired 6 x Bulkers from Ultrabulk ranging from 61,700 DWT to 37,900 DWT, built between 2012 to 2016 at Japanese yards, in an en bloc deal worth USD 124.65 mil, VV Value USD 127.83 mil. Supramax Sunrise Rainbow (56,400 DWT, Mar 2012, Jiangsu Hantong Ship Heavy Industry) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 15.50 mil, VV Value USD 14.04 mil - DD Due.
